base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of level_5_cursed_prison_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 castlevania. Level 5 Cursed Prison — Red Skeletons (regenerating) + Ghosts + Medusa-Heads. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Level 5 Cursed Prison — Red Skeletons (regenerating) + Ghosts + Medusa-Heads; falling-platform sections; vertical 825 px. Boss: Grim Reaper (Death)
